en.name: Systolic arterial pressure
en.shortDescription: Systolic arterial pressure — the peak arterial blood pressure during cardiac contraction (the upper number of a blood-pressure reading); any site, method or position.
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Systolic arterial pressure is the peak pressure inside the arteries during the contraction phase of the heartbeat (systole), when the heart ejects blood. It is the higher of the two numbers in a standard blood-pressure reading (e.g., the "120" in 120/80). Measuring it produces a numeric pressure value in millimetres of mercury (mmHg), obtained non-invasively (automated or manual cuff, or by palpation) or invasively (an arterial catheter and pressure transducer) [1]. It is one of the core vital signs, recorded in virtually every clinical setting and continuously in the intensive care unit and operating room. This concept set captures **numeric systolic arterial pressure values** across all measurement sites, methods, body positions and respiratory phases. Diastolic and mean arterial pressure are covered by dedicated concept sets, as is central venous pressure. ## Included Concepts This concept set contains 25 standard concepts (17 LOINC + 4 SNOMED — plus position/site/condition variants) organised below by what the source documents about the measurement. A concept may appear in more than one group. The default for an unqualified systolic reading is *3004249 / 8480-6 — Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)* or its SNOMED equivalent *4152194 / 271649006 — Systolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*. ### Generic systolic pressure - *3004249 / 8480-6 — Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: The generic systolic blood pressure, no site/method/position specified. Default mapping target. - *4152194 / 271649006 — Systolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED equivalent of the generic systolic blood pressure. - *4217013 / 72313002 — Systolic arterial pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED concept naming the systolic component of arterial pressure; equivalent in meaning to the generic systolic blood pressure. ### By measurement method - *21492239 / 76534-7 — Systolic blood pressure by Noninvasive (LOINC)*: Systolic pressure measured non-invasively, method stated. - *4354252 / 251070002 — Non-invasive systolic arterial pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED equivalent for a non-invasively measured systolic pressure. - *21490853 / 76215-3 — Invasive Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Systolic pressure from an invasive arterial line. Standard in the ICU and operating room. - *4353843 / 251071003 — Invasive systolic arterial pressure (SNOMED)*: SNOMED equivalent for an invasively measured systolic pressure. - *21490779 / 75997-7 — Systolic blood pressure by Continuous non-invasive monitoring (LOINC)*: Systolic pressure from continuous non-invasive monitoring (e.g., finger-cuff volume-clamp devices). - *3028737 / 8479-8 — Systolic blood pressure by palpation (LOINC)*: Systolic pressure estimated by palpation (inflating a cuff and feeling for the return of the pulse). Gives a systolic value only; used when a stethoscope or monitor is unavailable, or to avoid an auscultatory-gap error. - *37394652 / 1036551000000101 — Non-invasive central systolic blood pressure (SNOMED)*: Non-invasively estimated central (aortic) systolic pressure, as opposed to peripheral cuff pressure. ### By measurement site - *3005659 / 8512-6 — Radial artery Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Systolic pressure at the radial artery (usual arterial-line site). - *3010693 / 8568-8 — Radial artery - right Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)* and *3012979 / 8567-0 — Radial artery - left Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Side-specified radial measurements. - *3020524 / 8510-0 — Femoral artery Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Systolic pressure at the femoral artery. - *3006633 / 8554-8 — Femoral artery - right Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)* and *3006962 / 8553-0 — Femoral artery - left Systolic blood pressure (LOINC)*: Side-specified femoral measurements. ### By patient position Use only when the source explicitly records body position; otherwise use the generic concept. - *3009395 / 8461-6 — Systolic blood pressure--supine (LOINC)*: Measured lying flat. - *36303812 / 89268-7 — Systolic blood pressure--lying in L-lateral position (LOINC)*: Measured lying on the left side (used in obstetrics). - *3018586 / 8459-0 — Systolic blood pressure--sitting (LOINC)*: Measured sitting. - *3035856 / 8460-8 — Systolic blood pressure--standing (LOINC)*: Measured standing (part of orthostatic assessment). ### By respiratory phase - *3033616 / 8451-7 — Systolic blood pressure--inspiration (LOINC)* and *3000605 / 8450-9 — Systolic blood pressure--expiration (LOINC)*: Measured at a specified phase of breathing; relevant where respiratory variation (e.g., pulsus paradoxus) is documented. ### By clinical condition - *36305059 / 87739-9 — Systolic blood pressure--W exercise (LOINC)*: Measured during physical exercise (e.g., stress testing). - *36303525 / 87741-5 — Systolic blood pressure--post exercise (LOINC)*: Measured after exercise. - *36304016 / 89280-2 — Systolic blood pressure--during anesthesia (LOINC)*: Measured under anaesthesia (perioperative monitoring). ## Excluded Concepts The set is a curated list of numeric systolic arterial pressure measurements. Out-of-scope concepts from the surrounding blood-pressure hierarchies are intentionally not included: ambulatory and 24-hour summaries, percentile/centile values, self-reported pressures, neonatal-at-birth pressures, baseline and on-admission encodings, and any non-numeric findings. Diastolic, mean and central venous pressures are captured by their own dedicated concept sets. ## Mapping Notes - *Default concept*: When the source records a systolic value with no site, method or position, map to Systolic blood pressure (3004249 / 8480-6, LOINC), or its SNOMED equivalent (4152194 / 271649006) if the source is SNOMED-aligned. Do not infer a method or site that is not documented. - *Invasive vs. non-invasive*: Map to the invasive concept (21490853 / 76215-3, LOINC) only when the source identifies an arterial line, and to the non-invasive concept (21492239 / 76534-7, LOINC) only when a non-invasive method is stated. Otherwise use the generic concept. - *Palpated systolic*: Map to Systolic blood pressure by palpation (3028737 / 8479-8, LOINC) only when the source states the value was obtained by palpation. A palpated reading has no diastolic counterpart. - *Position*: Map to a positional concept only when body position is explicitly recorded with the reading. - *Common source labels*: "SBP", "SAP", "PAS" (pression artérielle systolique), "Systolic", "NIBP systolic" → Systolic blood pressure (3004249 / 8480-6, LOINC). "ABP systolic", "Art systolic" (arterial line) → Invasive Systolic blood pressure (21490853 / 76215-3, LOINC). - *Units*: Systolic arterial pressure is reported in mmHg. ## References [1] Magder S. The meaning of blood pressure. Crit Care. 2018;22(1):257. Available: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC6172730/

fr.name: Pression artérielle systolique
fr.shortDescription: Pression artérielle systolique — la pression artérielle maximale pendant la contraction cardiaque (le chiffre le plus haut d'une mesure de tension) ; tout site, méthode ou position.
